title: helichrysum callicomum
intro: Helichrysum callicomum, a member of the daisy family, is a flowering plant native to the subtropical regions of Australia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Helichrysum callicomum include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, including essential oils, teas, and tinctures.
